subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant -- what praise could be greater in this day, and what tribute more wondrous than this tribute? [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر عهد چه ستایشی الیوم اعظم از این عنوانست و چه مدحی ابدع از این مدح
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement
